title: scabiosa columbaria var. webbiana
intro: Scabiosa columbaria var. webbiana, also known as Webb's scabious, is a perennial plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae) native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Scabiosa columbaria var. webbiana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used topically in the form of salves and creams to promote wound healing and skin health.
